subcodes.first_line: By God! The Mother Book hath been sent down, yet the people comprehend it not. That which was inscribed in the Book hath been fulfilled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تالله قد نزل ام الکتاب و القوم لا یفقهون قد قضی ما کان مسطورا فی الکتاب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @call to action, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
